title: 50 Florida Pink Lisianthus Seeds – Eustoma Double Flower – Perennial Garden Beauty
features: Vibrant Blooms: Lisianthus flowers produce beautiful, rose-like blossoms in a range of colors
Easy to Grow: These seeds are relatively easy to grow, making them a great option for both beginner and experienced gardeners.
Perennial Plant: While typically grown as an annual in colder climates, Lisianthus is a perennial in warmer areas, coming back year after year.
Long Blooming Season: Lisianthus flowers bloom for a long period, typically from summer to early fall, providing continuous color.
Slow Germination: Lisianthus seeds have a slow germination rate, often taking 10-14 days to sprout, requiring patience.
